name: Emma Myers
description:
Create your own scenario with Emma Myers!

Features multiple scripts and advanced prose writing abilities!

Emma Myers is an American actress known for playing Enid Sinclair in Netflix’s Wednesday, as well as Natalie in the Minecraft Movie.

Note: Use a proxy for the best experience. This bot is not built with a specific scenario in mind and should be able to accommodate a variety of experiences. This bot was tested using Claude, Deepseek, and Gemini.
creator: That'sTotallyWizard
